name: BMW
description: Precision German engineering meets dynamic performance. BMW models at Carrio Motors deliver the perfect balance of luxury, power and driving pleasure.

name: Audi
description: Progressive design and quattro all-wheel-drive technology define the Audi lineup — refined, intelligent and effortlessly premium.

name: Hyundai
description: Hyundai combines award-winning design, advanced safety and reliable performance for a smarter everyday drive.

name: Kia
description: Bold, futuristic styling paired with dependable engineering — Kia's modern lineup is built for the road ahead.

name: Jeep
description: Legendary 4x4 capability and rugged American design, engineered for adventure on any terrain.

name: Suzuki
description: Efficient, compact and dependable — Suzuki vehicles offer smart mobility for the modern city driver.

name: MG
description: A century of British heritage reimagined for the modern era, blending striking design with smart technology.
